codeReview.summary: Implementation is comprehensive and meets all requirements. Four #[ignore] tests cover both Anthropic-compatible and OpenAI-compatible endpoints with both sync and streaming modes. API key is read exclusively from MINIMAX_API_KEY env var. Additional verification tests confirm correct env var reading and detect hardcoded keys.

issues.description: test_env_var_is_read_via_std_env logs first 8 characters of API key value. While this is a minor leak, it could be improved by not logging any portion of the API key. Current pattern: `&key[..key.len().min(8)]`.

summary: Feature successfully implements all required integration tests. All 4 live tests are properly marked #[ignore] and read API key exclusively from MINIMAX_API_KEY env var. Both Anthropic-compatible (https://api.minimax.io/anthropic) and OpenAI-compatible (https://api.minimax.io/v1) endpoints are tested with both sync and streaming modes using model MiniMax-M2.7. No hardcoded API keys found. One minor non-blocking issue: partial API key prefix is logged in test_env_var_is_read_via_std_env.
